title: viola walteri var. appalachiensis
intro: Viola walteri var. appalachiensis, also known as the Walter's violet or Appalachian violet, is a perennial plant species native to the eastern United States. It is a member of the violet family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Viola walteri var. appalachiensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
